assertions.description: nixie_ctl.sch contains 8 TLP627 phototransistor optocouplers (U1-U8) from the Isolator library (lib_id: Isolator:TLP627). These are galvanic isolation devices used to isolate the low-voltage control signals (ACTL_1 through ACTL_8) from the high-voltage anode drive signals. The analyzer reports isolation_barriers: [] despite 8 TLP627 isolators being present. The TLP627 is a well-known optocoupler from Toshiba.
